name: IdsEdwMbrCareOppIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT M.MBR_CARE_OPP_SK,CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) END SRC_SYS_CD,M.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,M.PRCS_YR_MO_SK,M.CARE_OPP_ID,M.CARE_OPP_SK,M.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_CARE_OPP M LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON M.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE M.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle}),filtered_data AS (SELECT MBR_CARE_OPP_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,MBR_UNIQ_KEY,PRCS_YR_MO_SK,CARE_OPP_ID,CARE_OPP_SK,MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM source_data WHERE MBR_CARE_OPP_SK <> 1 AND MBR_CARE_OPP_SK <> 0),row_one AS (SELECT 1 MBR_CARE_OPP_SK,'NA' SRC_SYS_CD,1 MBR_UNIQ_KEY,'175301' PRCS_YR_MO_SK,'NA' CARE_OPP_ID,'1753-01-01' CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,1 CARE_OPP_SK,1 MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,100 CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK),row_two AS (SELECT 0 MBR_CARE_OPP_SK,'UNK' SRC_SYS_CD,0 MBR_UNIQ_KEY,'175301' PRCS_YR_MO_SK,'UNK' CARE_OPP_ID,'1753-01-01' CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,0 CARE_OPP_SK,0 MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,100 CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM filtered_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM row_one UNION ALL SELECT * FROM row_two
